Write product slider section heading

Write section content in

tags
Write a clear CTA button label (2-4 words)
Shopify internal URL (shopify://collections/... or shopify://pages/...) or empty string

Write a short eyebrow claim for the product badge (e.g. '🇲🇽 Hecho en México · Real Fruit'). Lead with origin, key ingredient, or certification. Under 6 words. No generic claims like 'Premium Quality'.
Single emoji prefix matching brand personality (e.g. 🇲🇽 for origin, 🌿 for clean/natural, ✦ for premium, 🔬 for clinical). Must reinforce the badge_text claim, not decorate.
Hex background color for the badge. Use the brand primary color (e.g. '#D4266A'). Must pass contrast check against badge_font_color.
Hex text color for the badge. Must contrast against badge_bg_color. Use '#ffffff' on dark backgrounds, '#1a1a1a' on light backgrounds.
Product benefit bullet 1. Start with a specific ingredient or quality differentiator, not a generic claim. One line, under 8 words. Example: 'Real hibiscus, not artificial flavoring'.
Product benefit bullet 2. Cover a different value prop from item 1. Highlight a unique feature or certification. One line, under 8 words.
Product benefit bullet 3. Cover format, variety, or dietary claim distinct from items 1-2. One line, under 8 words.
Product benefit bullet 4. Focus on quantity or value (e.g. '50 servings per bag'). One line, under 8 words. Leave blank if fewer than 4 benefits.
Product benefit bullet 5. Focus on convenience or ease of use (e.g. 'Just add water'). One line, under 8 words. Leave blank if fewer than 5 benefits.
Value proposition tag label displayed above the value text (e.g. '★ Best Value', '★ Most Popular', '★ Fan Favorite'). 2-3 words with a star prefix.
Value proposition description highlighting the best deal with specific math (e.g. '1kg — 100 glasses, 27¢ each'). Include quantity, unit count, and per-unit cost. Never vague.
Hex color for checkmark circles. Use brand primary color. Must be visible against white background.
Header label for the perks marquee (e.g. 'Subscriber Perks', 'Member Benefits'). 2-3 words, describes what the perks are for.
Subscription perk 1. Lead with the specific benefit (e.g. 'Save 15% on every order'). Include a number or percentage. Under 6 words.
Subscription perk 2. Different benefit from item 1 (e.g. 'Free shipping every delivery'). Under 6 words.
Subscription perk 3. Address flexibility or trust (e.g. 'Cancel or pause anytime'). Under 6 words.
Subscription perk 4. Address convenience (e.g. 'Auto-delivered, never run out'). Under 6 words. Leave blank if fewer than 4 perks.
Subscription perk 5. Additional benefit (e.g. 'Priority customer support'). Under 6 words. Leave blank if fewer than 5 perks.
Hex background color for the perks header bar. Use brand primary or accent color. Must contrast against header_text.
Hex text color for the perks header label. Must contrast against header_bg. Typically '#ffffff' on dark or '#1a1a1a' on light.
Hex background color for the scrolling marquee area. Use '#ffffff' or a very light tint for readability.
Hex text color for the scrolling marquee items. Use '#1a1a1a' or brand body text color. Must be readable against marquee_bg.
Exact Shopify product option name that variant cards should display (e.g. 'Size', 'Pack', 'Flavor'). Must match the option name in Shopify admin exactly, case-sensitive.
Dollar amount threshold for showing free shipping badge on variant cards (e.g. '50'). Number only, no dollar sign. Variants priced at or above this show 'Ships Free'.
Hex background color for the 'Popular' badge on variant cards. Use a secondary or accent brand color that differs from best_badge_bg.
Hex background color for the 'Best Value' badge on variant cards. Use brand primary color or a strong accent. Must differ from popular_badge_bg.
Write a short announcement bar message with a specific offer or benefit (e.g. 'Free Shipping On Orders Over $50' or 'Subscribe & Save 15%'). Under 10 words. Must include a number or concrete benefit.
Write the header CTA button label (2-3 words, e.g. 'Shop Now', 'Browse All', 'Get Started').
Shopify internal URL for the header CTA button (e.g. 'shopify://collections/all') or empty string.
Primary navigation link 1 label. Typically 'Shop' or 'Products'. One word preferred.
Shopify internal URL for nav link 1 (e.g. 'shopify://collections/all') or empty string.
Primary navigation link 2 label. Typically 'About' or 'Our Story'. One word preferred.
Shopify internal URL for nav link 2 (e.g. 'shopify://pages/about') or empty string.
Primary navigation link 3 label. Typically 'Subscribe' or 'FAQ'. One word preferred.
Shopify internal URL for nav link 3 (e.g. 'shopify://pages/faq') or empty string.
Primary navigation link 4 label. Typically 'Contact' or 'Help'. One word preferred. Leave blank if only 3 nav links needed.
Shopify internal URL for nav link 4 or empty string. Leave blank if only 3 nav links needed.
Brand one-liner displayed below the logo in the footer. Under 10 words. Captures the brand promise or positioning (e.g. 'Simply Great Coffee', 'Real Fruit, Real Flavor').
Footer newsletter section heading (e.g. 'Stay in the Loop', 'Join the Club'). 3-5 words, action-oriented.

Footer newsletter description in

tags. One sentence explaining what subscribers get. Be specific (e.g. 'early access, member pricing, brewing tips').
Footer newsletter submit button label (e.g. 'Subscribe', 'Join', 'Sign Up'). One word preferred.

Footer newsletter legal disclaimer in

tags. Short opt-in consent text or empty string.
Full Instagram profile URL (e.g. 'https://instagram.com/brandname') or empty string.
Full TikTok profile URL (e.g. 'https://tiktok.com/@brandname') or empty string.
Full Facebook page URL (e.g. 'https://facebook.com/brandname') or empty string.
Footer column 1 heading (e.g. 'Shop', 'Products'). One word, labels the link group below.
Footer column 1 navigation links as richtext list. Include 3-5 links relevant to shopping (e.g. All Products, Best Sellers, Bundles, Subscribe).
Footer column 2 heading (e.g. 'Company', 'About'). One word, labels the link group below.
Footer column 2 navigation links as richtext list. Include 3-5 links relevant to the brand (e.g. Our Story, FAQ, Blog, Press).
Footer column 3 heading (e.g. 'Support', 'Help'). One word, labels the link group below.
Footer column 3 navigation links as richtext list. Include 3-5 links relevant to support (e.g. Contact Us, Shipping, Returns, Terms).

Legal disclaimer text for the footer in

tags. Important for functional beverages, supplements, or health-adjacent products. Include FDA disclaimer if applicable, or general copyright notice.
Write the About page headline (e.g. 'Our Story', 'How It Started'). 2-4 words, editorial not corporate.

Write a one-paragraph brand origin summary in

tags. 2-3 sentences covering what the brand is, where it came from, and why it exists. Specific and human, not corporate boilerplate.
Year the brand was founded (e.g. '2021'). Infer from brand data or use a plausible recent year if unknown.
Founder full name. Use the actual founder name if available from brand data, otherwise leave as 'Our Founders'.
Founder title (e.g. 'Co-Founder & CEO', 'Founder'). Keep it simple and authentic.

Write a 2-3 paragraph founder narrative in

tags. Paragraph 1: the personal problem or moment that sparked the idea. Paragraph 2: the journey from idea to product — specific details about sourcing, formulation, or process. Paragraph 3: where the brand is now and what drives it forward. Must feel personal and specific, not templated.
Mission section heading. 2-4 words (e.g. 'What We Stand For', 'Our Mission'). Editorial tone.

Write the brand mission statement in

tags. One clear sentence that captures the brand's purpose. Follow with 1-2 sentences expanding on how the brand delivers on that mission. No jargon, no buzzwords.
First brand value heading. 2-3 words, noun-based (e.g. 'Radical Transparency', 'Clean Sourcing'). Must be distinct from values 2 and 3.

First brand value description in

tags. 1-2 sentences explaining what this value means in practice — give a concrete example, not an abstract claim.
Second brand value heading. 2-3 words, distinct from values 1 and 3. Cover a different dimension (if value 1 is about ingredients, value 2 should be about people or process).

Second brand value description in

tags. 1-2 sentences with a concrete example. Must not overlap with value 1.
Third brand value heading. 2-3 words, distinct from values 1 and 2. Cover the remaining dimension (e.g. community, sustainability, innovation).

Third brand value description in

tags. 1-2 sentences with a concrete example. Must not overlap with values 1 or 2.
End-of-page CTA heading. 4-7 words, drives action or aspiration (e.g. 'Ready to Taste the Difference'). No period.

CTA supporting copy in

tags. 1-2 sentences reinforcing the brand promise and inviting the reader to act.
CTA button label. 2-3 words (e.g. 'Shop Now', 'Try It', 'Get Started').
Shopify internal URL for the CTA button (e.g. 'shopify://collections/all') or empty string.
